ocr_findings.description: The badge text '令和 6 年度 / 2024' in the hexagonal stamp is not captured in OCR. Minor omission of decorative edition badge text.

reviewer_notes: Book cover page with title graphic, exam name (ITパスポート), series name, and author name. OCR captured all primary text elements. The edition year badge (令和6年度/2024) embedded in the hexagonal graphic was not extracted but is a decorative element. Label 'cover' is correct.
